Building an MQL5 Expert Advisor that waits for volatility to compress, then rides the expansion — across 9 timeframes and multiple symbols at once.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

The Idea
Most breakout traders know the pattern: price coils inside a tightening range, volatility dries up, and then — often without warning — it explodes in one direction. Bollinger Bands are a natural tool for spotting the “coiling” phase, since the distance between the upper and lower bands shrinks visibly when volatility drops.
The hard part isn’t spotting the squeeze. It’s knowing three things at the moment it breaks:

• Is this actually a breakout, or just noise?

• Which direction is it likely to go?

• How much room should the trade have to breathe (stop-loss/take-profit), and how much should I risk?
This article walks through an EA I built to answer all three, using Bollinger Band width, the Ichimoku Cloud, and the Stochastic Oscillator together — running simultaneously across multiple symbols and nine timeframes, from 10-minute charts up to Daily.
Step 1 — Detecting the Breakout, Not the Squeeze Itself
